Name: Nagarjuna Sagar PSP
Notes: First PSP in India (1970). On-river. Upper: NS reservoir (FRL 590ft). Lower: tail pond. 7×100.8MW. Non-operational due to tail pond issues.

Name: Srisailam LBPH PSP
Notes: On-river PSP on Krishna River. Upper: Srisailam reservoir. Lower: tail pond 14km downstream. 6×150MW. Commissioned 1987.

Name: Kadamparai PSP
Notes: Off-river pure PSP in Tamil Nadu. Upper: Kadamparai reservoir. Lower: Aliyar reservoir. 4×100MW. Commissioned 1987. Owned by TNEB.

Name: Bhira PSP
Notes: On-river PSP in Maharashtra on Bhatsa River. 1×150MW. India's first private-sector PSP. Owned by Tata Power. Commissioned 1996.

Name: Ghatgar PSP
Notes: Off-river pure PSP in Maharashtra near Bhandardara. Upper: Ghatgar reservoir. Lower: Bhira reservoir. 2×125MW. Commissioned 2008. Owned by MAHAGENCO.

Name: Purulia PSP
Notes: Off-river PSP in Ajodhya Hills West Bengal. Upper: Bagmundi reservoir. Lower: Bandu reservoir. 4×225MW. Commissioned 2007. NHPC/WBSEDCL joint venture.

Name: Kadana PSP
Notes: On-river PSP in Gujarat on Mahi River. 4×60MW. Non-operational due to vibration issues and lack of tail pool dam.

Name: Sardar Sarovar RBPH PSP
Notes: On-river PSP in Gujarat on Narmada River. 6×200MW reversible units in River Bed Power House. Operation in pump mode pending approvals.

Name: Panchet Hill PSP
Notes: On-river PSP in Jharkhand on Damodar River. 1×40MW. Owned by DVC. Non-operational due to vibration issues.

Name: Tehri PSP (Stage II)
Notes: On-river PSP in Uttarakhand on Bhagirathi River. Upper: Tehri reservoir. Lower: Koteshwar reservoir. 4×250MW variable-speed. Units 1-3 commissioned 2025; Unit 4 expected Apr 2026.

Name: Kundah PSP (Stage I-III)
Notes: Off-river PSP in Tamil Nadu Nilgiris. 4×125MW. Likely commissioning by late 2024-25. Owned by TNEB.

Name: Koyna Left Bank PSP
Notes: On-river PSP in Maharashtra on Koyna River. Part of Koyna HEP complex. 80MW expansion. Owned by MAHAGENCO.

Name: Sharavathi PSP
Notes: Off-river PSP in Karnataka Western Ghats. 2000MW. CEA approved Aug 2024. Developed by KPCL.

Name: Upper Indravati PSP
Notes: Off-river PSP in Odisha. 600MW. CEA approved Aug 2024. Developed by OHPCL.

Name: Bhavali PSP
Notes: Off-river PSP in Maharashtra. 1500MW. CEA approved Sept 2024. Developed by JSW Energy. Expected commissioning 2028.

Name: Bhivpuri PSP
Notes: Off-river PSP in Raigad Maharashtra. 1000MW. CEA approved Sept 2024. Developed by Tata Power. Expected commissioning 2028.

Name: Pinnapuram PSP
Notes: Off-river PSP in Andhra Pradesh. 1680MW. India's first fully integrated renewable energy project (IRES). Developed by Greenko. ANDRITZ supplying electromechanical equipment.

Name: Gandhi Sagar PSP
Notes: On-river PSP in Madhya Pradesh on Chambal River. 1440MW (expandable to 1680MW). Developed by Greenko. ANDRITZ contract awarded.

Name: Turga PSP
Notes: Off-river PSP in Purulia district West Bengal near Ajodhya Hills. 1000MW. Companion project to Purulia PSP. Planned by WBSEDCL/NHPC.

Name: Greenko Rajasthan PSP
Notes: Off-river PSP in Rajasthan. 1000MW. Developed by Greenko as part of integrated RE storage project.
